model.name: tests
model.label: Tests Data
model.description: Array of test objects from getSchedulerData query

model.name: testStands
model.label: Test Stands Data
model.description: Array of test stand objects from getTestStands query (id, name, changeover_hours)

model.name: nonWorkingData
model.label: Non-Working Blocks
model.description: Array of non-working periods from getNonWorking query (id, test_stand_id, start_time, end_time, notes)

model.name: statusOptions
model.label: Status Options
model.description: Status strings shown in the right-click Change Status menu. 'NULL' clears the status.

model.name: allocations
model.description: Current allocation state: [{test_id, test_stand_id, priority_order}]

model.name: allTestIds
model.description: All test IDs managed by the scheduler (for the delete step in save)

model.name: plannedDates
model.description: Array of {test_id, planned_date} for all stand-scheduled tests. Use with savePlannedDates query.

model.name: saveMode
model.label: Save Mode
model.description: batch = save button, live = emit on every change

model.name: isSaving
model.label: Is Saving
model.description: Bind to: {{ saveAllocations.isFetching }}

model.name: hasSaveError
model.label: Has Save Error
model.description: Bind to: {{ !!saveAllocations.error }}

model.name: hasUnsavedChanges
model.description: Whether there are unsaved allocation changes

model.name: savedAt
model.label: Saved At
model.description: Bind to: {{ saveAllocations.lastRunAt }}

model.name: cardMainText
model.label: Card Title
model.description: Template for card title. Use {fieldName} for data fields.

model.name: cardSubText
model.label: Card Subtitle
model.description: Template for subtitle. Hidden when all fields are empty.

model.name: cardInfoRow
model.label: Card Info Row
model.description: Template for the info row shown on cards and bars.

model.name: tooltipTemplate
model.label: Tooltip Template
model.description: Template for hover tooltip. Use \\n for newlines.

model.name: assignedPartsLinkBaseUrl
model.label: Assigned Parts Link Base URL
model.description: Assigned parts render below the tooltip template using this URL prefix plus the serial number.

model.name: assignedPartsTemplate
model.label: Assigned Parts Source
model.description: Field or template used for the assigned-parts links section. Accepts {assigned_parts} or assigned_parts.

model.name: colorRunning
model.label: Running Colour
model.description: Override cap colour for Running status. Leave blank to use default (#9333EA).

model.name: colorReady
model.label: Ready Colour
model.description: Override cap colour for Ready status. Leave blank to use default (#22C55E).

model.name: colorOnTime
model.label: On Time Colour
model.description: Override cap colour for On Time status. Leave blank to use default (#E5A00D).

model.name: colorDelayed
model.label: Delayed Colour
model.description: Override cap colour for Delayed status. Leave blank to use default (#EF4444).

model.name: colorPartsNotAssigned
model.label: Parts Not Assigned Colour
model.description: Override cap colour for Parts Not Assigned status. Leave blank to use default (#9CA3AF).

model.name: colorInProgress
model.label: In Progress Colour
model.description: Override cap colour for In Progress status. Leave blank to use default (#E5A00D).

model.name: monoFont
model.label: Monospace Font
model.description: Font used for labels, badges, and stats. Leave blank to inherit the app theme font.

model.name: selectedTestId
model.description: ID of test actioned via right-click menu (set before events fire)

model.name: selectedTestPriority
model.description: New priority value from Change Priority action (numeric string)

model.name: selectedTestStartDate
model.description: New start date from Change Start Date action (ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD). Only set for Running tests.

model.name: selectedTestEndDate
model.description: New end date from Change End Date action (ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD). Only set for Running tests.

model.name: selectedTestStatus
model.description: New status from Change Status action. Empty string = NULL in DB.

model.name: changeoverHours
model.label: Changeover Hours
model.description: Hours for changeover between tests (work hours only)

model.name: appTheme
model.label: App Theme
model.description: Bind to {{ theme }} to inherit app colours, fonts, and border radius
